About

Who I Am

Seasoned fullstack engineer delivering scalable web products, API platforms, and high-converting e-commerce experiences.

Ruby on Rails Node.js GraphQL Shopify React Docker

Erwin Seribo

Fullstack Software Engineer

+ Years experience
30+ Projects shipped
6 Core platforms

I design and deliver reliable, maintainable software for teams that prioritize user experience, performance, and long-term stability.

My core stack includes Ruby on Rails, Node.js, GraphQL, Shopify, and modern front-end frameworks such as React, Vue, and Angular.

I thrive in collaborative environments, mentoring teams, refining delivery workflows, and consistently shipping ahead of schedule.

I also leverage AI-assisted development with tools like GitHub Copilot, VS Code AI agents, and vibe coding practices to accelerate delivery while maintaining quality.

Product engineering

Turn business goals into scalable architectures and polished user experiences.

System reliability

Design API and data flows that are resilient, observable, and secure.

Let us collaborate Explore my work

Career

What I Do

Strategic delivery partner focused on end-to-end execution, stakeholder alignment, and measurable impact.

01

Discovery to delivery

Translate business goals into scoped roadmaps, technical plans, and delivery milestones.

02

Quality and observability

Build with testing, monitoring, and incident readiness to protect uptime and trust.

03

Technical leadership

Drive standards, code reviews, and documentation that keep teams aligned and fast.

Delivery Console Live
+ Years in production
99.9% Target uptime
24/7 Ops readiness
Discovery QA Strategy SLOs Monitoring Release Mgmt

Execution loop

Align -> Design -> Build -> Validate -> Scale

Location

Based in the Philippines

Remote-first collaboration with global teams, anchored in a disciplined routine and consistent delivery.

Remote + On-site meetups

Based in the Philippines, I lead remote-first delivery with a structured cadence that protects deep focus while keeping teams in sync.

I partner seamlessly across time zones using Slack, Google Meet, Zoom, and async updates to keep projects clear, fast, and accountable.

I am equally comfortable with remote execution and periodic on-site workshops for alignment, planning, and high-impact collaboration.

GMT+8

Primary timezone

Remote-first

Distributed teams

Hybrid-ready

On-site meetups

Focus mode

Deep work blocks

Development Environment

Tools I'm using

I work on a MacBook Pro with an external monitor and a streamlined development setup optimized for speed and reliability.

My environment is built to support long-lived projects, consistent performance, and clean delivery.

Core tools:

Editors: VS Code and Cursor.

AI assistants: GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, and Claude for coding support and reviews.

Terminal: iTerm with Oh My Zsh.

Databases: Sequel Pro and TablePlus for MySQL and Postgres.

QA: Chrome for web testing and Postman for APIs.

Collaboration: Slack, Google Meet, and Zoom.

const toolkit = [
"VS Code", "Cursor", "Copilot",
"ChatGPT", "iTerm", "Postman",
"TablePlus", "Slack"
];

Lets Connect

Ready to build something ambitious?

If you need a senior engineer who can own delivery, unblock teams, and ship with quality, I would love to learn the scope and priorities.

I move fast without sacrificing reliability, partner closely with product and design, and deliver production-ready work from discovery to launch.
